sections.paragraph:
(for עֱוִי, from the root עָוָה, to overturn, to destroy), pl. עִיִּים m.

(1) ruins, ruinous heaps, Mic 1:6 Jer 26:18 Mic 3:12 Psa 79:1 comp. מְעִי.

(2) עִיִּים Num 33:45, and more fully עִיִּי הָעֲבָרִים verse 44 Num 33:44 21:11 (“the ruinous heaps of mount Abarim”), [Ije-abarim], a part of mount Abarim.

(3) עִיִּים [Iim], a town of the tribe of Judah, Jos 15:29.
